TSN.5.HD.ca2.subtitle: The Vision

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs (Kick-off 4.00pm). Coverage of the match from Twickenham Stoop. These two sides last met in the reverse fixture back in October when the Chiefs came away with a 38-0 victory. Exeter were already 24-0 up at half-time before scoring another unanswered 14 points to claim the dominant victory.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby (Kick-off 6.30pm). Coverage of the match from StoneX Stadium. The reverse fixture at the end of December saw Saracens come away from Gloucester with a hard-fought 30-21 win. The game was on a knife-edge at half-time with the score 17-14 to Saracens before two tries in the space of six minutes took the game away from Gloucester and earnt the hosts an important victory.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

HBO.East.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.East.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.East.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Suicide Squad
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Figuring they're all expendable, a U.S. intelligence officer decides to assemble a team of dangerous, incarcerated supervillains for a top-secret mission. Now armed with government weapons, Deadshot, Harley Quinn, Captain Boomerang, Killer Croc and other despicable inmates must learn to work together. Dubbed Task Force X, the criminals unite to battle a mysterious and powerful entity, while the diabolical Joker launches an evil agenda of his own.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Saltburn
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dust Bunny
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Twister
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Weapons
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Enemy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Smashing Machine
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Florida Project
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Color Purple
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). HBO.West.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

HBO.West.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.West.us2.description: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

HBO.West.us2.title: Dune
HBO.West.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.West.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.West.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.West.us2.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: The Golden Generation

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.West.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.West.us2.description: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

HBO.West.us2.title: Lurker

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Andale
HBO.West.us2.description: A few years after high school, Rue's debts finally catch up with her; hoping to finance her dream wedding, Cassie tries to become internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who's juggling the demands of running Cal's business.

HBO.West.us2.title: Euphoria

HBO.West.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: The Ballad of Paladin

HBO.West.us2.title: Euphoria

HBO.West.us2.description: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Stand Still and See

As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Talk Black

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale

Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Two

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!

After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dust Bunny

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Warfare

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Zola

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wilson

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ne Zha 2

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Slave Play. Not a Movie. A Play.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "Slave Play" was one of Broadway ́s most celebrated, genre bending productions, breaking records and receiving critical acclaim for tackling race, sex, and interracial relationships in a way never before seen on stage. Harris takes viewers behind the scenes, from run throughs to performance, as he strips down his own work and directs new actors through workshop rehearsals.

With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy

CNN.HD.us2.title: The Last Laugh: Stephen Colbert
CNN.HD.us2.description: For over a decade, Stephen Colbert hosted a late-night show where comedy, politics, and culture collided nightly; explore how he shaped an era of American satire and the impact of one of its most thoughtful voices signing off.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Inferno
CNN.HD.us2.description: On April 26, 1986, a massive explosion rips through a reactor during a safety test at a power plant in Ukraine, triggering the worst nuclear accident in history; within 24 hours, a lethal radioactive cloud starts to circle the globe.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Cover Up
CNN.HD.us2.description: The day after the incident, helicopter crews brave deadly radioactive smoke to extinguish the fire raging in the reactor core. As 50,000 locals evacuate, Soviet authorities try to conceal the scale and human cost of the accident.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Sacrifice
CNN.HD.us2.description: In the weeks following the meltdown, workers battle lethal radiation to clear debris and construct a protective tomb around the destroyed reactor. Amid speculation, Soviet scientists reveal what they can about the cause of the catastrophe.

CNN.HD.us2.title: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
CNN.HD.us2.subtitle: Fallout
CNN.HD.us2.description: As the USSR collapses, an investigation uncovers the cause of the accident and scale of the Soviet cover up. Today, Chernobyl's toxic legacy persists as the nuclear exclusion zone becomes a war zone, raising fears of another disaster.

Soon, Colt meets Lizzie Bradbury (Kirsten Dunst), a beautiful American tennis player with an upcoming match of her own, and finds the inspiration he hopes will turn his luck around.

The journey takes Bilbo on a path through treacherous lands swarming with orcs, goblins and other dangers, not the least of which is an encounter with Gollum and a simple gold ring that is tied to the fate of Middle Earth in ways Bilbo cannot even fathom.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
TBS.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

TBS.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad

Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Wonder Woman 1984
TBS.HD.us2.description: Diana Prince lives quietly among mortals in the vibrant, sleek 1980s -- an era of excess driven by the pursuit of having it all. Though she's come into her full powers, she maintains a low profile by curating ancient artifacts, and only performing heroic acts incognito. But soon, Diana will have to muster all of her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah, a villainess who possesses superhuman strength and agility.

Uniting their instincts for showmanship and political savvy, they race against time to ultimately reveal who's a songbird and who's a snake.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games
AMC.HD.us2.description: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire

As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. AMC.HD.us2.description: Following her rescue from the devastating Quarter Quell, Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) awakes in the complex beneath the supposedly destroyed District 13. Her home, District 12, has been reduced to rubble, and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) is now the brainwashed captive of President Snow (Donald Sutherland). At the same time, Katniss also learns about a secret rebellion spreading throughout all of Panem -- a rebellion that will place her at the center of a plot to turn the tables on Snow.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: Realizing the stakes are no longer just for survival, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) teams up with her closest friends, including Peeta (Josh Hutcherson), Gale (Liam Hemsworth) and Finnick for the ultimate mission. Together, they leave District 13 to liberate the citizens of war-torn Panem and assassinate President Snow, who's obsessed with destroying Katniss. What lies ahead are mortal traps, dangerous enemies and moral choices that will ultimately determine the future of millions.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: A New Hope
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Imperial Forces -- under orders from cruel Darth Vader (David Prowse) -- hold Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) hostage, in their efforts to quell the rebellion against the Galactic Empire. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill) and Han Solo (Harrison Ford), captain of the Millennium Falcon, work together with the companionable droid duo R2-D2 (Kenny Baker) and C-3PO (Anthony Daniels) to rescue the beautiful princess, help the Rebel Alliance, and restore freedom and justice to the Galaxy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
AMC.HD.us2.description: The adventure continues in this "Star Wars" sequel. Luke Skywalker (Mark Hamill), Han Solo (Harrison Ford), Princess Leia (Carrie Fisher) and Chewbacca (Peter Mayhew) face attack by the Imperial forces and its AT-AT walkers on the ice planet Hoth. While Han and Leia escape in the Millennium Falcon, Luke travels to Dagobah in search of Yoda. Only with the Jedi master's help will Luke survive when the dark side of the Force beckons him into the ultimate duel with Darth Vader (David Prowse).

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique afirma que necesita internar a su esposa, quien está deprimida tras ser despedida. Señala que no cumple sus responsabilidades como madre y esposa, pese a recibir terapias psiquiátricas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Poseído por mamá; Fish spa chupitos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Orlando pide que su hermano Neifry deje de comportarse como su madre fallecida. Carla se infecta con una bacteria al hacerse un tratamiento de belleza con peces, ahora exige que cierren el spa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La justicia en tus manos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexa no puede soportar que Darío le pida matrimonio a Camila y lo acusa de violación para meterlo a la cárcel. Sin embargo, gracias a Luisa hay pruebas de su mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Donde nace el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roscio es una mujer ambiciosa que decide entregar a su sobrina María Eugenia por dinero. Finalmente, Maru consigue un hogar donde hay amor, pero la inagotable codicia de su tía la persigue.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caminar juntos por la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de su boda, Alicia es arrollada por un automóvil y queda inválida. Su novio, Ricardo, la abandona, pero Gustavo llega a su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Felipa: Un grito por todas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipa sufre la brutal muerte de su hija, quien fue violada y asesinada. La joven delataba en su blog a los responsables de atacar a mujeres indefensas y la indiferencia de las autoridades.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Paola: Red de engaños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paola instala una app de citas y conoce a quien parece ser el hombre de sus sueños. Cuando descubre un video sexual suyo en internet se entera de que él es Jimmy, El gurú de la seducción.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Durmiendo con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula está desesperada y siente que su siempre amado Diego puede ser su salvación. No sabe que él espera su mejor momento para atacar. Gavino discute con Augusto y manda a eliminarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tictac tictac
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ofelia, enfocada en su labor como periodista, ha evadido una situación grave hasta que alguien le hace concientizar que debe detener a su mellizo, Patricio, quien es una persona peligrosa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jade accede a un acuerdo con su hermano y cuñada para hacer los oficios del hogar y cuidar el bebé de la pareja, pero cree que ahora se están aprovechando. La jornada es de 12 horas diarias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra está indignada porque su amiga Lizeth le debe tres meses de renta y ese dinero lo usa para satisfacer a su novio, Brayan. La confrontación aumenta cuando busca traer el chacal a casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El llamado de la justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino logra sembrar la desconfianza entre Circe y Diego. Ahora, ambos deben decidir qué harán para solucionar su situación. Augusto quiere aprovecharse de Diana, la hermana de Marlene.

Michel se disfrazó de Kory y se presentó a un examen con la intención de ayudarla, pero fue descubierto y ambos fueron sancionados y expulsados del sistema educativo.

En otro caso, Kysha perdió su trabajo como seguridad en un hotel porque tenía orden de no dejar pasar a prostitutas y dejó pasar a Frida y a Cindy, sin saber que ellas estaban intentando conquistar a algún hombre adinerado de los que estaban hospedados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El Mil Amores
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una mujer le pide a un hombre que se haga pasar por su esposo ausente para asistir a un evento en el colegio de su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hijo me odia por culpa de mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y su madre están enfrentadas por la custodia de un niño de once años, hijo de Mayra. El pequeño no quiere saber nada de su mamá porque al parecer, la abuela lo manipula emocionalmente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Además de viuda, cuernuda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un mes después de la muerte de Martín, Erika, su viuda, descubre que él le era infiel y quiere vengarse de Gabriela, la amante de su esposo, quien responde que todo eso es parte de su pasado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Yo soy gay; Sin clítoris
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jairo sufre un derrame cerebral y al salir del coma tiene una nueva orientación sexual. Consume unos hongos que le provocan alucinaciones y, al otro día, despierta con el clítoris mutilado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Trans boxeadora asesina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yandi pide compensación a Josué, organizador de la pelea donde murió su esposa. Lo culpa por permitir que se enfrentara a una transexual, él alega que desconocía el género de la contrincante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Terrible despertar; Desgarrada de huevos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexander está hundido en la depresión, su amiga y terapeuta le decide aplicarle un tratamiento de choque y él piensa que morirá. Valentín demanda a Débora por arrancarle un testículo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad; Vendiendo tareas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia quiere regresar a Colombia para realizarse profesionalmente y le propone a su marido que cuide de sus hijos durante ese tiempo. Una madre le causó un daño irremediable a su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Juan Charrasqueado y Gabino Barrera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos héroes son unidos por la aventura, pero se separan cuando los dos se enamoran de la misma mujer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Soy charro de rancho grande
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un hombre sencillo abandona su rancho y va a la ciudad, donde conoce a una mujer que interrumpe sus planes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El asesino de mi hermano; Slow fashion
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natasha busca al hombre que mató a su hermano y decide casarse con él para vengarse, sin imaginar que su plan tomaría otro rumbo. Una modelo es víctima de activistas fuera de control.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cádiz
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Castellón buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Cádiz CF intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Córdoba CF buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, cada detalle pesa: Albacete BP intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda empuja: Málaga de amplitud, centros medidos y presión tras pérdida para instalarse en campo rival. El Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar cuando encuentre salida; si controla el ritmo y acierta en la primera llegada, puede convertir el duelo en una noche de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Deportivo
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Cádiz necesita un partido de mínimos: bloque compacto, control emocional y precisión en los centros para vivir cerca del área rival sin desordenarse. El Dépor, instalado en la zona alta, buscará mandar con ritmo y amplitud; si convierte su dominio en remates claros y gana la batalla de segundas jugadas, puede inclinar un duelo exigente en las áreas.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cádiz

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Sardinero empuja a un Racing que quiere llevar el partido a campo rival, apretar tras pérdida y sostener su candidatura al ascenso directo. El Valladolid necesita sumar para alejarse de la zona baja: plan pragmático, área protegida y salidas rápidas. Si aguanta el primer golpe, el partido puede girar por detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Deportivo - Andorra

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Romareda aprieta: el Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez, control emocional y eficacia en su área. El Sporting llega con ambición de zona media-alta y buscará ritmo por fuera y presencia en el área; si el Zaragoza compite rechaces y balón parado, puede sacar puntos clave.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: U17-Europameisterschaft der Frauen
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Deutschland U17 F – Spanien U17 F (Halbfinale)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Premier League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: 31. Spieltag: Manchester City – Crystal Palace
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die teuerste und die vielleicht auch beste Liga der Welt im Mutterland des Fußballs. Alle Spiele, alle Spieler, die Trainer und jede Menge Hintergrundinfos aus den Stadien und Trainingsplätzen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Frankreich 1998
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: A-League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Adelaide United – Auckland FC (Semi Final, Rückspiel)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der Fußball fristete in Australien lange ein Dasein als Randsportart, erfreut sich aber zunehmender Beliebtheit. In der höchsten Spielklasse spielen neun australische und ein neuseeländischer Club. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Chance Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Slavia Prag – Sparta Prag (32. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Liga ist nach dem Sponsor Fortuna benannt, Es ist die höchste tschechische Spielklasse im Fußball der Männer. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Scottish Premiership
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Meisterkonferenz: Hearts – Falkirk und Motherwell_ Celtic (37. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Argentinien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (Viertelfinale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Scottish Premiership
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Celtic Glasgow – Heart of Midlothian (38. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Scottish Premiership ist seit 2013 die höchste Fußballliga in Schottland und gehört zur Scottish Professional Football League. 2013 wurde sie als Nachfolger für die Scottish Premier League gegründet.  (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: FC Porto – CD Santa Clara (34. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: AFC Champions League Two
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Al-Nassr (SAR) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der AFC Cup ist für Asien das, was die UEFA Europa League für Europa ist: der zweithöchste Fußballwettbewerb für die Vereinsmannschaften auf dem Kontinent.  (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Liga Profesional
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: (Halbfinale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Palmeiras – Cruzeiro (16. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Scottish Premiership
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Celtic Glasgow – Heart of Midlothian (38. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die Scottish Premiership ist seit 2013 die höchste Fußballliga in Schottland und gehört zur Scottish Professional Football League. 2013 wurde sie als Nachfolger für die Scottish Premier League gegründet.  (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: AFC Champions League Two
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Al-Nassr (SAR) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der AFC Cup ist für Asien das, was die UEFA Europa League für Europa ist: der zweithöchste Fußballwettbewerb für die Vereinsmannschaften auf dem Kontinent.  (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.
